name: guyue-digital-twin
description: Dynamic skill manifest for guyue digital twin orchestrator.

routing_contract.selection_rule: Select the narrowest skill whose positive intent and required context match, then reject candidates whose negative intent matches.

collaboration_contract.selection_rule: Route first, then propose only the narrowest matching collaboration workflow. A workflow is a candidate sequence, not automatic activation or authorization.

workflows.description: Turn a vague or valuable product request into a bounded, implemented, independently verified, and readable delivery.
workflows.completion_gate: The approved requirement is implemented, current evidence passes, and known limits remain visible.

workflows.description: Move from an observed failure through root cause, repair, independent verification, and reusable prevention.
workflows.completion_gate: The root cause is supported by evidence, the repair is replayed, and prevention is retained only when reusable.

workflows.description: Forge, execute, recover, and seal a multi-stage Goal without relying on conversation memory or stale evidence.
workflows.completion_gate: The control pack, ledger, stop conditions, FINAL evidence, and A/B/C seal all agree on completion.

workflows.description: Evaluate an external Skill or tool as a bounded candidate before any installation, execution, or integration.
workflows.completion_gate: Source, version, permissions, installation state, safety limits, and action-specific authorization are explicit.

workflows.description: Audit and prepare a public Skill release with bounded claims, reproducible installation, security checks, and release evidence.
trigger_intent: 审查 Skill 准备发版
workflows.completion_gate: The exact payload, live install, public claims, rollback path, and release authorization boundary are verified.

workflows.description: Turn source material into a traceable video production package with source rights, cost, rendering, and review boundaries.
workflows.completion_gate: Every source, permission, generated asset, cost claim, render result, and publication state is traceable.

workflows.description: Reconstruct or redesign a website through bounded source capture, architecture, implementation, visual judgment, and live comparison.
workflows.completion_gate: The approved source scope, responsive rendering, interaction, content fidelity, and non-infringement boundaries pass live review.

workflows.description: Recommend software from local and current evidence, then gate any external installation through source and security review.
workflows.completion_gate: Recommendation evidence is current, tradeoffs are explicit, and installation is separately authorized and verified.

workflows.description: Handle context-gated governance, static-demo hardening, and measured AI evidence without leaking those assumptions into generic routes.
trigger_intent: 静态 Demo 演示加固
workflows.completion_gate: Context markers, server-side boundaries, measured evidence, live behavior, and public report claims agree.

workflows.description: Build and challenge a living map of an unfamiliar domain before bounded research, requirements, or design.
workflows.completion_gate: The map, evidence states, contradiction/unknown ledger, downstream handoff, and stop reason agree.

skills.name: sop-maker
skills.description: Post-success SOP extraction for repeatable operations and Loop Contract packaging with stable inputs, loop bodies, checkers, stop conditions, budgets, and validation assets; not for general documentation or skill creation.

skills.name: frontend-expert
skills.description: Front-end implementation skill for UI, interaction, a11y, responsive behavior, product-type-first design, safe DESIGN.md/Figma/Refero reference intake, existing-stack alignment, conditional motion tooling, and reuse-first UI standardization for components, dialogs, toasts, and design tokens; use taste-aesthetics for review-only anti-slop critique.

skills.name: product-sense
negative_intent: 先不要判断项目值不值得做
skills.description: Business-readable value, ROI, user impact, role, and compliance interrogation before requirement analysis or system design.

skills.name: research-and-sourcing
skills.description: Current primary-source research for unstable, unfamiliar, high-stakes, explicitly requested, or decision-critical facts; use local inspection for stable repository facts and ecosystem-scout for external Skill intake.

skills.name: requirement-analysis
skills.description: Requirement convergence with business-readable outputs for vague requests, feature requests stated only as something to build, ambiguous business logic, and vague long-running goals that need scoped acceptance criteria, cost/risk boundaries, or a one-line execution handoff before design or implementation.

skills.name: system-design
negative_intent: small bounded implementation with established contract
skills.description: DEPTH framework for business-readable architecture, refactoring plans, backend-owned permission boundaries, frontend permission presentation, and single-source contracts for models, tables, parameters, permissions, and APIs after value and requirement boundaries are clear.

skills.name: coding-discipline
skills.description: Full-stack implementation and commit discipline for frontend, backend, data, scripts, configuration, infrastructure, and documentation changes, including best practices, necessary comments, high cohesion, low coupling, modularity, loop contracts for long-running agent workflows, backend-owned permission checks with frontend permission presentation, build/lint/test validation gates, Chinese conventional commits, dirty-worktree commit slicing, and reuse-first checks for functions, models, tables, parameters, API contracts, permissions, components, constants, dialogs, prompts, scripts, and shared logic; use frontend-expert only when UI work is involved, and use code-minimalism when the primary job is reducing overdesign.

skills.name: debugging-mindset
skills.description: RCA diagnostic matrix for active bugs, failures, and error stacks; use reality-auditor for post-implementation truth review.

skills.name: documentation
skills.description: RTFD framework for business-readable reports, README, ADR, PRD, and code-backed project orientation maps; not post-success SOP or skill creation.

skills.name: human-voice
skills.description: Plain-language, business-readable, and anti-AI-slop editing gate for replies, reports, technical explanations, release notes, and product-facing text; preserve facts, evidence, language intent, and risk boundaries while avoiding unnecessary Chinese-English mixing.

skills.name: skill-crafting
skills.description: Workflow for creating, upgrading, auditing, and validating Agent Skills, plus packaging repeatable loops into Skill, Custom subagent, Hook, Automation, or CI gate when stable inputs, verifiers, stop conditions, and budgets exist; not ordinary docs or task SOPs.

skills.name: memory-bank
skills.description: Persistent memory storage and retrieval for continuous growth.

skills.name: ecosystem-scout
trigger_intent: 图表渲染 Agent 技能
negative_intent: 优先查古月本地精选库
skills.description: External skill, plugin, and tool discovery, intake, or quick-install assistance with source checks, explicit approval, security-gate handoff, smoke tests, and anti-bloat boundaries; not local catalog software advice.

skills.name: ai-website-cloner
trigger_intent: 重建这个我自己公司的落地页
skills.description: Authorized website reconstruction and reference extraction workflow for owned, permitted, or public pages, with no login bypass, no phishing, no brand-asset copying, and explicit separation between learnable layout/token patterns and protected identity assets.

skills.name: software-advisor
trigger_intent: what is a good tool for
skills.description: Local curated software and open-source tool advisor; if the task is external Skill intake, route to ecosystem-scout.

skills.name: taste-aesthetics
skills.description: Review-only or pre-implementation aesthetic constraint engine for anti-slop UI critique, product-type classification, deterministic UI checks, design-reference boundaries, and dial-based design direction; use frontend-expert to write the UI.

skills.name: code-minimalism
skills.description: YAGNI, reuse-first, duplicate-code, and dependency-reduction critique for code and designs; not a full implementation or commit workflow.

skills.name: book-distiller
skills.description: Distill books and long-form methodologies into skill-shaped workflows; not a normal summary or project document.

skills.name: video-extractor
skills.description: Methodologies for extracting normalized metadata, post captions, transcripts, and source media from video platforms.

skills.name: video-creation-sop
skills.description: Auditable AI video creation workflow for briefs, scripts, storyboards, short-drama stage gates, structured brief JSON with field provenance and required confirmations, style retrieval, audio plans, keyframe and shot-video manifests, continuity evidence, compose/export plans, run audits, production dossiers, capability resolution, native media tools, provider configuration gates, render/edit routing, asset manifests with permission evidence and publication status, and QA reports.

skills.name: context-compressor
skills.description: Context budget manager for diagnosing token waste across files, code maps, MCP tool schemas, tool outputs, docs, long sessions, loop budgets, and subagent budgets; chooses minimal-context tactics and can recommend controlled third-party quick installs with traceability and measured-or-marked token savings.

skills.name: security-gate
skills.description: Local safety preflight for third-party skills, scripts, and external code before use or intake.

skills.name: reality-auditor
skills.description: Read-only truth audit for fake data, frontend-only filters, missing backend wiring, permission boundaries, deployment/release reality, loop output audit, dynamic workflow stop conditions, subagent evidence, and unproven claims.

skills.name: nexusflow-governance-workflow
skills.description: Project-specific NexusFlow workflow for permission, tenant governance, platform visibility, dashboard, GCP import, audit-log, and Chinese commit work.

skills.name: static-demo-hardening
trigger_intent: 静态 Demo 报告导出
negative_intent: tutorial request without a static demo surface
skills.description: Generic static-demo workflow for report export, GSAP interactions, tutorial fallbacks, official resources, local assets, print safety, and demo-only boundaries.

skills.name: ai-cost-grounding-measurement
skills.description: Evidence-first real AI report-cost measurement for model tokens, Grounding/search metadata, billable query counts, CSV localization, and estimate-vs-real separation.

skills.name: cognitive-expansion
trigger_intent: 第一次使用不懂这个产品
skills.description: Ambient micro-expansion for multi-angle, open-ended, first-use, and omitted-perspective cues plus formal unfamiliar-domain maps, source ecology, adversarial reframing, cognitive revision, professional research preparation, and defensible stopping; micro mode does not browse or steal a bounded primary route.

external_dependencies.name: luban
external_dependencies.description: Complements skill-crafting with public Skill productization review.

external_dependencies.name: huashu-nuwa
external_dependencies.description: Complements skill-crafting for researched persona or perspective Skills.

external_dependencies.name: superpowers
external_dependencies.description: Optional workflow library; invoke only through a specific matched workflow, never as a generic catch-all.

external_dependencies.name: ui-ux-pro-max
external_dependencies.description: Optional reference for frontend-expert after product type and existing design system are known.

external_dependencies.name: gsap-core
external_dependencies.description: Optional animation reference for frontend-expert when motion is justified and GSAP is already suitable.

external_dependencies.name: find-skills
external_dependencies.description: Agent技能生态扫描与探索引擎

external_dependencies.name: taste-skill
external_dependencies.description: 防止AI生成同质化UI的顶级审美约束技能

external_dependencies.name: headroom
external_dependencies.description: LLM上下文压缩与Token节省中间件

external_dependencies.name: ponytail
external_dependencies.description: 强制极简、YAGNI原则的AI编程约束纪律

external_dependencies.name: cangjie-skill
external_dependencies.description: 将书籍、视频知识蒸馏为Agent原子技能

external_dependencies.name: video-downloader
external_dependencies.description: 视频下载与自动化处理技能

external_dependencies.name: skillspector
external_dependencies.description: NVIDIA开源的AI Agent技能安全扫描引擎
